contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Allelopathic — inhibits growth of neighbouring plants. Keep away from vegetables.

notes: The key ingredient in absinthe. Intensely bitter silver-grey foliage. Very drought-tolerant. Hardy perennial. Insect repellent. Keep away from vegetable beds — root exudates inhibit nearby plants.
